body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content
I need more parameters in CloudMicrophysics.jl and TurbulenceConvection.jl

Not sure if this is the correct workflow. I thought one of the benefits of the new way of handling parameters is that I would not have to open PRs to repos different than the one that needs the parameters? 

This is also a breaking change because I need to change one parameter name.
title: Add more parameters, bump major version
